name: World Wrestling 23
author: Poki
description: World Wrestling 23 is a fighting game in which you'll have to prove you're the best wrestler of them all! In a match, you will have to use High Attacks, Low Attacks and clever defensive actions to win. When you attack your enemy, you will have to press the right combination of buttons to perform your wrestling move. But be careful! Your opponent can do the same and escape the attack, so you'll have to be fast. In Championship mode you can pick a wrestler from your favourite country and set out for the World Champion Title. In a 4 match bracket you will have to win every match to become number one! Finally, there's Versus mode in which you and a friend can see who the best wrestler is in a one on one match. You both have 30 seconds to score as many points as possible. The wrestler with the most points wins! Can you become the next wrestling champion? How to play World Wrestling 23? Single Player Use the arrow keys to move around and defend yourself! Use A, S and D to attack! Multiplayer Player One Use the arrow keys to move around and defend yourself! Use J, K and L to attack! Player Two Use WASD to move around and defend yourself! Use C, V and B to attack! Who created World Wrestling 23? World Wrestling 23 was created by FromChris. This is their first game onPoki! How can I play World Wrestling 23 for free? You can play World Wrestling 23 for free on Poki. Can I play World Wrestling 23 on mobile devices and desktop? World Wrestling 23 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play World Wrestling 23 with my friend? Yes! World Wrestling 23 is a multiplayer game so you can play locally with your friends!
